title: chilocarpus decipiens
intro: Chilocarpus decipiens, also known as the 'Hairy Calotropis', is a flowering plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Chilocarpus decipiens include wound healing, antiseptic properties, and the treatment of skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
